task_completion.description: Create a 4-way intersection on the canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax canvas shows a graphic of a 4-way cross intersection or crossing roads.

task_completion.description: Label the streets 'Oak Street' and 'Pine Avenue'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels 'Oak Street' are visible along the vertical (North-South) road, and 'Pine Avenue' along the horizontal (East-West) road.

task_completion.description: Add a North Arrow to the diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: A compass rose or an arrow explicitly indicating 'North' is present on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Place a Blue Sedan and Red SUV in a T-bone collision
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blue car (sedan) is positioned on Oak Street facing North (up), and a red car (SUV) is positioned on Pine Avenue facing East (right). The two vehicles are touching or overlapping in the intersection to depict a T-bone collision.

task_completion.description: Add skid marks behind the Blue Sedan and a case number text box
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tire track/skid mark graphics are visible directly behind the blue sedan. A text box containing 'Case #2024-891' is visible somewhere on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Save as .eddx and export as .pdf in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax save/export dialog boxes or a file manager window showing the files 'accident_sketch_2024_891.eddx' and 'accident_sketch_2024_891.pdf' in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through EdrawMax's toolbars, shape libraries, and canvas, rather than using terminal scripts to generate the files.

integrity.description: The diagram consists of actual graphical shapes, not just text
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas contains visual shapes for roads, cars, and arrows, rather than just being a blank document with text descriptions of the scene.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save and export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes in EdrawMax are visible in the screenshots, confirming the files were generated by the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are '/home/ga/Documents/accident_sketch_2024_891.eddx' and '/home/ga/Documents/accident_sketch_2024_891.pdf'. The diagram must contain the exact text strings 'Oak Street', 'Pine Avenue', and '2024-891'. Visually, the diagram should include shapes representing a 4-way intersection, a North arrow, a blue sedan, a red SUV, and skid marks.
